_schema.description: Crafting recipes extracted from ServUO craft system Def*.cs files. Keyed by craft system slug.

system_fields.main_skill: ServUO SkillName of the craft system
system_fields.source: servuo path of the Def file
system_fields.skipped: AddCraft/AddRes calls that could not be parsed

recipe_fields.name: resolved item display name
recipe_fields.min_skill: skill at 0% success chance (can be negative)

resources.name: You don't have the components needed to make that.

recipes.name: weathered bronze man on a bench sculpture
